title: Your Room Under the Eaves
description: Morning light through leaded glass, birdsong, the smell of something baking. You are eighteen years old today, and the house knows it — you can hear your parents not-whispering about it downstairs.

skills.text: Linger at the window a moment
skills.resultText: The forest goes on forever from up here, green over green. Somewhere past the far ridge is everything you've only read about on museum placards — and this morning, for the first time, the thought feels less like a daydream and more like a door.
